steps.observed: JSON returned with content containing Key Facts, Recent Sessions, Active Stack sections; tokens_estimate=677

steps.action: Navigate to Context Preview section via nav link
steps.expected: Context preview page loads with inject.py output
steps.observed: Page shows Memory Context Preview heading, Token Budget slider (2000), Project filter (All Projects), Regenerate button, and ~677 tokens estimated

steps.expected: Content shows Key Facts, Recent Sessions, Active Stack
steps.observed: Content matches API output: Key Facts with tool/preference/context/decision categories, Recent Sessions, Active Stack sections visible
Preview updated to ~437 tokens estimated (down from ~677 at 2000)
Preview updated to ~677 tokens estimated (full content fits within 4000 budget)

steps.action: Compare content at different budget levels
steps.expected: Lower budget shows less content, higher budget shows more
steps.observed: Confirmed: 500 budget shows ~437 tokens (truncated content), 4000 budget shows ~677 tokens (full content)

steps.expected: Preview regenerates scoped to Kalshi project
steps.observed: Preview title changed to '# Memory Context (/home/ec2-user/projects/Kalshi)', ~566 tokens estimated, content includes Kalshi-specific decision fact (Moved Ivanhoff Trading Bot)

steps.action: Verify project dropdown populated with real projects
steps.observed: 16 project options available from /api/projects endpoint, including Kalshi, ivanhoff-trading-bot, etc.

steps.expected: Preview refreshes with fresh inject.py output
steps.observed: Preview refreshed successfully, showing ~677 tokens estimated with updated content

steps.action: Verify no console errors after regeneration

frictions.description: SPA click handling: Playwright's click command times out on SPA nav links that use addEventListener. Used eval to trigger .click() via JavaScript on data-section elements and the regenerate button.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to call .click() directly on DOM elements

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. Context preview correctly displays inject.py output, responds to token budget changes (437 tokens at 500 budget vs 677 at 2000+), filters by project, and refreshes on regenerate. No console errors observed.
